subject: affs: fix a memory leak in affs_remount
notes: Reused features.json and POC skeleton from prior aborted lu-5-rep1 attempt; rewrote seed.c as standalone-compilable (added stubs for kuid_t/kgid_t/struct affs_sb_info etc.).
POC rewritten as single _buggy variant mirroring seed structural counts; verifier-v1 OK on first regen: OK(F1.acq=0 F1.rel=3 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=5 F2.if=5).

Final query uses hasUnreleasedReturn predicate (line-number heuristic): exists a ReturnStmt after the kstrdup acquire with no kfree(v) preceding it. This fires on the affs_remount_buggy success path (return 0 / return res) where new_opts is not freed.

lu-1 template's not-hasMatchingRelease pattern would NOT fire here because the buggy fn DOES have one kfree(new_opts) on the parse_options-error path; switched to hasUnreleasedReturn which catches per-return-path leaks.
Cell knobs: compositional=ON (6 validated predicates), POC=ON (verifier-v1 gated).
